zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Beaujeu於大約1001年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾時，她的父親Guichard I de Beaujeu22歲，母親Adélaïde Emelde31歲。她和Guigues Ier d' Albon至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1050年4月29日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Beaujeu于大约1001年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾时，她的父亲Guichard I de Beaujeu22岁，母亲Adélaïde Emelde31岁。她和Guigues Ier d' Albon至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1050年4月29日之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Beaujeu was born about 1001, in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guichard I de Beaujeu, was 22 and her mother, Adélaïde Emelde, was 31. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Guigues Ier d' Albon. She died after 29 April 1050.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Beaujeu est née environ 1001, à Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guichard I de Beaujeu, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde Emelde, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Guigues Ier d' Albon. Elle est décédée après 29 avril 1050.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Beaujeu um 1001 in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guichard I de Beaujeu 22 und ihre Mutter Adélaïde Emelde 31. Sie hatte mit Guigues Ier d' Albon mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 29. April 1050.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Beaujeu è nata il circa 1001 nel Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guichard I de Beaujeu, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Adélaïde Emelde, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Guigues Ier d' Albon. Morì dopo il 29 aprile 1050.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaujeuが約1001年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアルドeチェアルボン- ド'アルドeチェで生まれた時，父Guichard I de Beaujeuは22歳，母Adélaïde Emeldeは31歳であった。彼女はGuigues Ier d' Albonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1050年4月29日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Beaujeu(이)가 대략 1001년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 아드e체 알보- 드'아르드e체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guichard I de Beaujeu(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adélaïde Emelde(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Guigues Ier d' Albon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 4월 29일 이후 사망했다.

mn.environ 1001–after 29 April 1050: ойролцоогоор 1001 он–1050 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 29–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Beaujeu nasceu aproximadamente 1001, em Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guichard I de Beaujeu, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde Emelde, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Guigues Ier d' Albon. Ela faleceu após 29 de abril de 1050.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Beaujeu родилась около 1001 г. в местности албон- д'ардeч, ардeч, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guichard I de Beaujeu было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde Emelde, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Guigues Ier d' Albon. Она умерла после 29 апрель 1050 г.

sm.environ 1001–after 29 April 1050: e tusa o le 1001–ina ua ma'ea le 29 Aperila 1050

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Beaujeu nació aproximadamente 1001, en Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guichard I de Beaujeu, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Adélaïde Emelde, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Guigues Ier d' Albon. Murió después de 29 de abril de 1050.
